page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 4 physical cores, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The processing power is supplied by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Additionally, the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, though the lack of hyperthreading limits parallel execution threads to the physical core count.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g9a.xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. It is well-suited for applications such as mid-tier web servers, application hosting, microservices, and lightweight database instances that do not require high-speed local storage or specialized hardware accelerators.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz on an x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It operates with a dedicated CPU allocation of 4 physical cores and 1.0 thread per core, ensuring consistent performance without hyperthreading. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. It does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource profile makes it a cost-efficient option for general-purpose workloads, including application hosting, mid-tier web serving, and microservices.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, operating on a KVM hypervisor with no local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, 16 GB of RAM, and consistent performance for standard workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 processor with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps for consistent data transfer
No bundled local storage, requiring network-attached block storage
Suitable for general-purpose workloads, mid-tier web servers, and microservices
